name: Walt Disney's Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and cinnamon. Set aside.
2. Cream butter in a very large bowl until smooth.
3. Beat in granulated and brown sugars, then add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add water and vanilla extract to the mixture, stirring until well blended, about 4 minutes.
5. Mix oats, raisins, and flour mixture into the sugar mixture, stirring until thoroughly combined.
6. Drop by large tablespoons onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 9 to 14 minutes, or until light-brown in color. Cool on the baking sheet before removing from the pan.
